items.title: Adani Enterprises Q3 Results: Cons PAT surges 97 times YoY to Rs 5,627 crore on one-time gain, revenue up 9%
items.description: Adani Enterprises Q3 Results: Adani Enterprises reported a 97 times jump in its December quarter consolidated net profit at Rs 5,627 crore compared to Rs 58 crore reported in the year ago period. The profit after tax (PAT) includes one time gain of Rs 5,632 crore on AWL stake sale.

items.title: Aditya Birla Lifestyle Brands Q3 net profit rises 14.4pc to Rs 69 cr, revenue up 9.5pc
items.description: Aditya Birla Lifestyle Brands Ltd has reported a 14.42 per cent year-on-year increase in its consolidated net profit to Rs 69.01 crore for the December quarter of FY26.

items.title: One Mobikwik Q3 Results: Co swings to profit of Rs 4 crore vs loss YoY
items.description: Fintech firm One Mobikwik clocked a consolidated profit of Rs 4 crore for December quarter 2025 as compared to loss a year ago, mainly on account of reduction in payment processing charges, lending operational business and cost optimization.

items.title: Adani Ports Q3 Results: Cons PAT jumps 21% YoY to Rs 3,054 crore, revenue rises 22%
items.description: Adani Ports Q3 results: Adani Ports reported a strong Q3 with a 21% YoY rise in net profit to Rs 3,054 crore and 22% revenue growth. EBITDA jumped 20% as the company raised its FY26 guidance. Logistics, marine services and international ports delivered robust gains, while cargo volumes and container market share remained healthy.

items.title: Bajaj Finance Q3 Results: Profit falls 6% YoY to Rs 4,066 crore on labour code impact, NII jumps 21%
items.description: Bajaj Finance Q3 Results: Bajaj Finance on Tuesday reported a 6% year-on-year (YoY) decline in its consolidated net profit for the third quarter at Rs 4,066 crore. The drop in bottomline was mainly due to an accelerated ECL provision and one-time charge of new labour codes.

items.title: Bharat Coking Coal Q3 Results: Revenue drops 25% YoY; Coal India arm slips into losses to Rs 23 crore
items.description: Bharat Coking Coal posted a Q3FY26 net loss as revenue fell sharply year-on-year. Sequential improvement, lower expenses and post-IPO interest offered some relief, though shares slipped on weak earnings despite broader market strength after strong listing and heavy investor demand.

items.title: Varun Beverages Q3 Results: PepsiCo India bottler's profit rises 36% YoY on stronger volumes
items.description: India's Varun Beverages reported a ‍higher quarterly profit ​on Tuesday as higher sales ⁠volumes and lower borrowing costs supported margins, sending shares up 4.9% in afternoon trade.

items.title: AWL Agri Business Q3 Results: Profit down 35% to Rs 269 crore
items.description: AWL Agri Business Ltd, formerly known as Adani Wilmar, on Tuesday posted 35 per cent drop in consolidated net profit at Rs 269 crore for December quarter 2025-26 on higher expenses.

items.title: Nazara Tech Q3 Results: Profit tanks 35% to Rs 8.84 crore
items.description: Diversified gaming platform Nazara Technologies on Tuesday posted a 35.3 per cent drop in consolidated profit for the December quarter at Rs 8.84 crore, as revenue from operations also fell.

items.title: AB Capital Q3 Results: Cons PAT jumps 33% YoY to Rs 945 crore, revenue up 27%
items.description: Aditya Birla Capital posted a strong Q3FY26 with profit rising 33% and revenue up 27%, led by robust lending, insurance and asset management growth, improving asset quality and higher disbursements across businesses.
